rationale: 'Computational neuroscience (attractor neural networks / associative memory)' denotes the same specific field as the reference 'computational neuroscience', just with a parenthetical subfield tag. Both mechanisms describe the same specific Hopfield-style machinery: an energy function whose local minima act as stored fixed-point attractors, with downhill relaxation/descent implementing content-addressable retrieval, so mechanism_match holds and the answer is equivalent.
